description.en: UnionPay is a Chinese financial services company and global card network operated by China UnionPay, enabling UnionPay-branded card payments and acceptance worldwide.

api_fields.value: CUP, China UnionPay, UnionPay Card, Ginren

tip: If UnionPay approvals are low, review decline reasons and try enabling 3D Secure and optimized routing with your acquirer/PSP.

faq.question: Is UnionPay a payment processor or a card network?
faq.answer: UnionPay is primarily a card network/brand. To accept it online or in-store, you typically use a PSP and an acquiring bank that supports UnionPay.

faq.question: Where is UnionPay accepted?
faq.answer: UnionPay acceptance is available globally through participating acquirers and payment providers, with strong usage in China and cross-border travel corridors.

faq.question: Can I accept UnionPay for ecommerce (online) payments?
faq.answer: Yes, if your PSP/acquirer supports UnionPay for online card payments. Availability and required fields depend on your provider’s integration.

faq.question: How can I improve UnionPay approval rates and reduce declines?
faq.answer: Use accurate card data, pass complete billing/device details where available, enable 3D Secure if supported, and work with your acquirer/PSP on routing and decline analysis.

faq.question: Does UnionPay support refunds and partial refunds?
faq.answer: Refunds are generally supported, and partial refunds may be available depending on your PSP/acquirer and transaction type.

faq.question: How are UnionPay disputes handled?
faq.answer: Disputes are handled through the chargeback process via your acquiring bank or PSP. Keep clear proof of delivery/service and respond within deadlines.

seo.seo_description: UnionPay is a global card network. Learn how to accept UnionPay cards online and in-store via supported PSPs and acquirers.
seo.keywords: UnionPay,China UnionPay,card network,UnionPay card payments,3D Secure,chargebacks,refunds,merchant acceptance
